name: 绘画入门
subject: inquiry
domain_name: 视觉艺术 / Visual Arts / Visual Arts
curriculum_points: Students will be able to experiment with a variety of tools and techniques (e.g., line, shape, texture) to represent observations and ideas visually (K-2).
Students will be able to use drawing as a tool for inquiry, planning, and detailed visual communication, explaining their artistic choices (3-5).

interactive_resources.code_hint: Canvas 探究式学习动画：问题→假设→实验→结论流程可视化
interactive_resources.description: Canvas/JS 探究学习过程可视化
